candidate_definition_hints.text: Claude Code Skill Factory — A powerful open-source toolkit for building and deploying production-ready Claude Skills, Code Agents, custom Slash Commands, and LLM Prompts at scale. Easily generate structured skill templates, automate workflow integration, and accelerate AI agent development with a clean, developer-friendly setup.

source_repo_description: Claude Code Skill Factory — A powerful open-source toolkit for building and deploying production-ready Claude Skills, Code Agents, custom Slash Commands, and LLM Prompts at scale. Easily generate structured skill templates, automate workflow integration, and accelerate AI agent development with a clean, developer-friendly setup.
